name: solis-assistant
description: Solis — minimalist voice-first AI assistant with glassmorphism aurora UI and multi-backend LLM (Groq · OpenRouter Zen · Ollama).

scripts.assets:generate: npm run build && (npm run preview -- --port 4173 --strictPort &) && npx wait-on http://localhost:4173 -t 60000 && SOLIS_BASE_URL=http://localhost:4173 npx playwright test scripts/assets.spec.ts --reporter=list
scripts.assets:generate:headed: npm run build && (npm run preview -- --port 4173 --strictPort &) && npx wait-on http://localhost:4173 -t 60000 && SOLIS_BASE_URL=http://localhost:4173 npx playwright test scripts/assets.spec.ts --reporter=list --headed
